mapper.select: select id, username, password, real_name, role, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_user where username = #{username} limit 1
select id, username, password, real_name, role, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_user order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (username, password, real_name, role, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{role}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_user set username = #{username}, password = #{password}, real_name = #{realName}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
